AOI_DEPLOYMODEL: Replace with your Azure AI Foundry Deployment model
AOI_ENDPOINT: Replace witu your Azure AI Foundry Enpoint. STOP at the .com , Example - https://aidev.openai.azure.com
GITHUB_DEPLOYMODEL: Replace with your GitHub Model (e.g., openai/gpt-4o-mini)
GITHUB_ENDPOINT: Replace with your GitHub Models endpoint (e.g., https://models.github.ai/inference)
GITHUB_API_KEY: Replace with your GitHub API Key
EMBEDDINGS_DEPLOYMODEL: Replace with the deployment name of your Embeddings model
GEOCODING_API_KEY: Replace with your Geocoding API Key
AI_SEARCH_URL: Replace with your AI Search URI
AI_SEARCH_KEY: Replace with your AI Search API Key
